name.description: The type identifier of the document

recipient_type.description: The type of recipient associated with the document (will be `Contractor` for Contractor Documents)

recipient_uuid.description: Unique identifier for the recipient associated with the document

pages.description: List of the document's pages and associated image URLs. This is only returned for documents with `required_signing` = `true`, and can be used for signing preparation.

fields.description: List of the document's fields and associated data. Values are set for auto-filled fields. This is only returned for documents with `required_signing` = `true`, and can be used for signing preparation.

x.description: X-coordinate location of the field on the page

y.description: Y-coordinate location of the field on the page

signed_at.description: When the document was signed (will be `null` if unsigned)

requires_signing.description: A boolean flag that indicates whether the document needs signing or not. Note that this value will change after the document is signed.

draft.description: If the document is in a draft state

year.description: The year of this document. This value is nullable and will not be present on all documents.

quarter.description: The quarter of this document. This value is nullable and will not be present on all documents.

Example.title: Taxpayer Identification (Form W-9)
Example.name: taxpayer_identification_form_w_9
Example.description: Form W-9, Request for Taxpayer Identification Number and Certification

404.description:
Not Found 
  
The requested resource does not exist. Make sure the provided UUID is valid.
